title: marsilea deflexa
intro: Marsilea deflexa, also known as Water Clover or Australian Water Clover, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the Marsileaceae family. This plant is traditionally used in various herbal remedies due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Marsilea deflexa include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Marsilea deflexa can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
